programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Antony Cotton. Antony Cotton renovated an apartment in an 18th-century church, but it turned into a horror film when two dead bodies were found beneath the floor. S5, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Jo Wood. Jo Wood wants to learn more about the spirits monitoring her 19th-century farmhouse. Medium Ian suspects a strong connection to the surrounding land. S4, Ep5
Teleshopping.
Drew visits some family-run businesses in Lincolnshire, Norfolk and Grimsby in the hope of finding rare and unusual antiques that have never been put on sale before. S13, Ep15
In a huge barn in Sussex, Drew discovers a large collection of animal-themed curiosities and objects. And in Cardiff, Drew's favourite kind of antiques are finally revealed. S13, Ep11
A woman longs to move back to Merseyside after 20 years. She has £600,000 to spend on a spacious property close to her family, that she can call home again. S7, Ep16

Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep17
Drew visits a disused fuel shed on a former air force base in Suffolk, where he discovers vases carved from cow bones and a haunting stone face corbel. S17, Ep11
Drew and Tee visit Newark, a town renowned for its antique connections. Drew finds a set of Regency bed steps and a genuine, very rare 18th century mirror. S17, Ep12
Drew and Tee visit Insect Circus in Suffolk, where they discover a giant pair of 20th-century stage shoes and scratch-made models of fairground rides. S17, Ep13
Antiques experts Christina Trevanion and Thomas Plant begin their road trip in Ireland. They both start the journey with £200, can they make a profit? S12, Ep16

First up, the team bring a well-loved Indian guitar back to life. Plus, leather expert Suzie is challenged with restoring a vintage RAF-issued flying jacket. S6, Ep17
The Medal Detector. Irita unearths rare military medals whilst helping sisters clear their childhood home. She also responds to an SOS from a couple who need to downsize. S1, Ep4/10
67-year-old Joselyn Taylor was born profoundly deaf and adopted at 11 months old. Nicky and Davina help find her older brother James. S12, Ep2
49-year-old Murray is desperate to be reunited with his brother Ricky. Plus, 87-year-old Mark searches for the truth about his family. S12, Ep3
Dad's Valuable Hoard. Angus clears a collection of ancient artefacts from the home of a legendary musician. He then helps sisters part with their aunt's treasures. S5, Ep1
Copper Kettle Cupid. Angus visits a house packed to the rafters with vintage copper. Then he helps a couple clear their home before they relocate to Thailand. S5, Ep2
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep6
Angus travels to the small village of Boynton to clear out a collection of vintage telephones. Plus, he helps a family sort through 50 years of clutter. S2, Ep1
Angus is asked to help with an emotional house clearance in Stockton-on-Tees. Later, he is invited to examine the work of two semi-professional artists. S2, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Claire Sweeney. For decades, Claire Sweeney has sensed a presence in her apartment. A mysterious figure is regularly sighted in her hallway. What will the team find? S4, Ep6

programmes.show_description: Gary Numan. Gary Numan and his family moved into a 12-bedroom castle, only to encounter ghostly apparitions and a sinister presence targeting his daughter. S5, Ep1
